summary: Completed frontend testing of Rhino Drishti intelligence platform. All previously identified critical issues have been successfully fixed. Dashboard stats display correctly, Cross-Border page title shows proper name, Intelligence Feed loads consistently. Navigation and core functionality working well.

design_issues.flow: Daily Brief and Weekly Trends page titles during loading
design_issues.issue: Page titles show generic 'Rhino Drishti' during initial load instead of specific page titles immediately

passed_tests: Dashboard stats showing correct values (32 total, 4 critical, 11 high, 14 medium, 3 low) - PREVIOUSLY FIXED
Cross-Border page title displays 'Cross-Border Developments' correctly - PREVIOUSLY FIXED
Intelligence Feed loading consistently with 15 items displayed - PREVIOUSLY FIXED
Alerts page showing 'Critical & High Alerts' title correctly
All main navigation links working (Dashboard, Intelligence Feed, Cross-Border, Alerts)
Search functionality working (tested with 'drug' query returning 1 result)
Filter system working (state filter for Assam returning 2 results)
Filter panel toggle and state selection functioning properly
NER map rendering with state-wise statistics and interactions
Recent critical alerts display in dashboard sidebar
Threat distribution and state-wise distribution charts loading
Military theme and responsive design maintained
No frontend errors or console issues detected
